themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long waits: Nearly all contacts are Managers, and a significant share have been waiting over 90 days—many over 200—signaling a systemic gap in proactive Manager-level engagement before frustration compounds.

Multi-contact accounts indicate unresolved friction: Several accounts (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn/Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, Vetcor, 29th Street Living) appear multiple times, suggesting a shared pain point or unmet product need that one conversation has not resolved.

Vertical clusters point to shared workflow themes: Contacts cluster around multifamily residential, fitness/wellness franchises, hospitality, and travel/real estate, suggesting that product feedback is likely to surface consistent cross-account themes around location reporting, franchise-level visibility, and time savings that could inform roadmap prioritization.
